insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain valuable insights into the topics that need your attention. Focus on building a daily habit of learning, even if it's just 10-15 minutes a day, and you'll be surprised at how quickly your scores and streaks will start to reflect your progress, helping you stay motivated and engaged throughout your journey.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
